Row.Text: This upgrade adds a stupid amount of XP to any unit built in this city. (+1500 XP) Also adds the "Woodsman" promotion to all land units, which allows them to ignore the terrain costs of forests and jungles.

This upgrade adds a stupid amount of XP to any unit built in this city. (+1500 XP) Also adds the "Woodsman" promotion to all land units, which allows them to ignore the terrain costs of forests and jungles.
